Model before rewriting:

letting n be 10
letting nDomain be domain int(0..((n - 1)))

and([ and([ quasiGroup[i, quasiGroup[i, j]] = quasiGroup[quasiGroup[i, j], j] | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
and([ quasiGroup[i, i] = i | i : nDomain ]),
and([ sum([quasiGroup[i, (n - 1)],2;int(1..)]) >= i | i : nDomain ])
